legal_notice.title: WEBEATER: Weave a Connection
content: This form seals a cryptographic link between two entities in the Sovereign Trace ledger.
The reference seal must be a valid, previously sealed SHA-256 hash from the STP ledger.
False references invalidate this link permanently.

fields.label: Source Identity
fields.description: Your name, organization, or GitHub handle.

fields.label: Target Identity
fields.description: The name or organization you are linking to.

fields.label: Reference Seal
fields.description: The 64-character SHA-256 seal of the trace you are linking to. Must be exact.

fields.label: Nature of Connection
fields.description: Select the type of relationship this link represents.

fields.label: Contextual Evidence
fields.description: Briefly describe the significance of this link. What does it record?
fields.placeholder: Sealed AI failure report for [system] on [date]. Link establishes audit chain.

fields.label: Declaration
options: I confirm the Reference Seal above belongs to a real, previously sealed trace. I understand a false reference invalidates this link.

steps: Reference seal validation — Checked against STP ledger.
Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Ledger entry — Enters the Sovereign Trace ledger with your name, timestamp, and SHA-256 hash.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash.
after_submit.footer:
The link is permanent. The seal is the connection.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
